companies.name: Museo de Ciencias Frontera
companies.address: Tercera Etapa del Río, 22226 Tijuana, B.C.
companies.description: An interactive space designed for kids and visiting families to learn about science, technology, and the environment through hands-on exhibits. A perfect and educational vacation day trip.

companies.name: Baja Medical Excellence
companies.address: Blvd. Agua Caliente 456, Zona Río, 22010 Tijuana, B.C.
companies.description: Cutting-edge clinic specializing in medical tourism. We offer family dentistry and pediatric services with the highest international standards for international travelers seeking quality care.

companies.name: Tacos El Rey del Norte
companies.description: Authentic Tijuana-style taqueria. A welcoming atmosphere famous for its traditional street tacos and unmatched guacamole. A must-visit culinary tradition for anyone exploring the city.

companies.name: Refaccionaria del Noroeste
companies.address: Blvd. Díaz Ordaz 321, La Mesa, 22105 Tijuana, B.C.
companies.description: Wide assortment of auto parts and tools. If you are road-tripping across the border, we specialize in replacement parts, batteries, and everything needed for emergency vehicle maintenance.

companies.name: Burritos y Guisos La Mesa
companies.description: Delicious homemade food ready to enjoy. Specializing in authentic bean burritos and vegetarian options, ideal for a quick, family-friendly lunch while sightseeing.

companies.name: Frontera Cloud Solutions
companies.address: Parque Industrial El Florido 987, 22234 Tijuana, B.C.
companies.description: Modern software consulting and coworking spaces. A great hub for digital nomads and remote workers traveling through Baja, featuring networking events for tech professionals.

companies.name: Tijuana Tech Hub
companies.address: Av. Paseo de los Héroes 159, Zona Río, 22010 Tijuana, B.C.
companies.description: Tech hub and development agency offering short-term workspace solutions, reliable internet, and tech support for international visitors and traveling developers.

companies.name: Servicio Mecánico El Centinela
companies.address: Libramiento Sur 753, Francisco Villa, 22150 Tijuana, B.C.
companies.description: Trusted mechanic shop for cross-border travelers. We perform reliable oil changes, mileage checks, and general maintenance to ensure your road trip continues safely back home.

companies.name: Parque de Aventuras Baja Kids
companies.address: Blvd. Cuauhtémoc Sur 852, Colonia Gabilondo, 22044 Tijuana, B.C.
